tasks.description: Create project directories and configuration files for Module 1.

steps.description: Create directories: src/core, src/modules/prompt_gen, tests/core, tests/modules/prompt_gen
Create empty __init__.py files in all created directories
Create requirements.txt with google-genai, pydantic, python-dotenv, pytest, pytest-mock
Create .env.example with placeholders for GOOGLE_API_KEY and GEMINI_MODEL
Create .gitignore to exclude .env, __pycache__, and .pytest_cache

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Project structure exists. Requirements file lists all dependencies. Gitignore excludes sensitive files.

tasks.description: Develop a configuration manager that reads settings from Runtime, File, and Environment variables in priority order.

steps.description: Create src/core/config.py and tests/core/test_config.py
Implement ConfigManager class with methods to set/get API keys and models
Implement priority logic: Runtime args > config.json (simulated) > .env

tasks.acceptance-criteria: ConfigManager correctly resolves API key from highest priority source. Missing key raises appropriate error.

unit: Runtime injection overrides environment variable
Environment variable is used when runtime/file are missing
get_api_key returns correct value for all sources
get_model_name defaults to gemini-3.1-pro-preview if not set

tasks.description: Create strict Pydantic schemas for Prompt Input and Output to ensure JSON mode compatibility.

steps.description: Create src/modules/prompt_gen/schemas.py
Define PromptInput model (text_prompt, image_path optional)
Define PromptOutput model (positive_prompt, negative_prompt, style_parameters)

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Schemas validate correct input types and reject invalid data. PromptOutput schema can be exported to JSON schema format.

unit: PromptInput accepts valid text and optional image path
PromptOutput validation fails if positive_prompt is missing
PromptOutput serializes to expected JSON structure

tasks.description: Define an abstract base class to standardize the prompt generation interface across different providers.

steps.description: Create src/modules/prompt_gen/interface.py
Define abstract method generate(input: PromptInput) -> PromptOutput

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Abstract class prevents instantiation. Concrete subclasses must implement generate method.

unit: Cannot instantiate BasePromptGenerator directly
Subclass without generate method fails to instantiate

tasks.description: Develop the Gemini adapter to construct correct API requests using the Google GenAI SDK.

steps.description: Create src/modules/prompt_gen/gemini_adapter.py
Implement initialization logic using ConfigManager
Implement _construct_request method to prepare messages and config

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Adapter initializes with correct model. Request payload includes system instructions and JSON schema.

unit: Adapter initializes with API key from ConfigManager
System prompt is correctly formatted
Generation config includes response_mime_type='application/json'

tasks.description: Implement response handling logic to parse JSON output and handle API errors.

steps.description: Implement generate method in GeminiAdapter
Add error handling for API failures and malformed JSON
Convert raw JSON response to PromptOutput object

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Valid JSON response is converted to PromptOutput. Network errors or invalid JSON raise custom exceptions.

unit: Parses valid JSON string into PromptOutput object
Raises custom exception on API 500 error
Raises validation error if API returns non-conforming JSON
integration: Mocked client returns success and adapter returns valid object

tasks.description: Create a script to run a real end-to-end test against the Gemini API (requires valid API key).

steps.description: Create demo_module1.py in project root
Script should read real .env, instantiate adapter, and print result

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Script runs successfully with a valid API key and prints a structured PromptOutput.

e2e-manual: Run script with valid key -> verify JSON output matches pixel art requirements
Run script with invalid key -> verify error message

tasks.description: Add Pillow to requirements.txt for image saving and processing, and update environment variables.

steps.description: Add Pillow to requirements.txt
Update .env.example with GEMINI_IMAGE_MODEL placeholder

tasks.acceptance-criteria: requirements.txt includes Pillow and .env.example contains GEMINI_IMAGE_MODEL placeholder.

tasks.description: Define an abstract base class to standardize the image generation interface across different providers.

steps.description: Create src/modules/image_gen and tests/modules/image_gen directories with __init__.py
Create src/modules/image_gen/schemas.py to define ImageGenInput and ImageGenOutput
Create src/modules/image_gen/interface.py defining abstract method generate

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Directory structure is set up. Schemas enforce input and output types. Interface prevents direct instantiation.

unit: Schemas validation rejects incorrect types and validates expected schema
interface raises TypeError when instantiating BaseImageGenerator directly

tasks.task: Implement ConfigManager Support for Image Models
tasks.description: Update ConfigManager to handle different model keys for image generation.

steps.description: Add get_image_model() method to ConfigManager
Prioritize CLI runtime arg --image-model over GEMINI_IMAGE_MODEL in .env

tasks.acceptance-criteria: ConfigManager returns valid image_model_name from env or default string.

unit: get_image_model returns GEMINI_IMAGE_MODEL environment variable value
get_image_model returns default model name if env variable is absent
get_image_model respects explicit initialization override

tasks.task: Implement Gemini Image Generator Adapter API Logic
tasks.description: Build adapter utilizing google-genai SDK's models.generate_images to trigger image creation with proper payload.

steps.description: Create src/modules/image_gen/exceptions.py with ImageGenerationError
Create src/modules/image_gen/gemini_adapter.py extending BaseImageGenerator
Implement construction logic extracting prompts and configuring model generation params (e.g., aspect_ratio=1:1 and person_generation='allow_adult')

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Exception handler intercepts API errors. The generate function invokes the GenAI SDK with Fixed aspect_ratio strings.

unit: Adapter initialization fetches the api_key and correct image model name from config_manager
generate function delegates effectively to the client wrapper and catches API exceptions

tasks.task: Implement Image Save And Byte Encoding Logistics
tasks.description: Implement processing of GenerateImagesResponse to convert bytes to a saved PIL Image.

steps.description: Extract image bytes generated by Gemini adapter
Load bytes using Pillow Image module
Generate unique filesystem path and save as PNG

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Adapter successfully intercepts raw bytes, validates against PIL integrity, and commits output to filesystem.

unit: Mocked GenerateImagesResponse successfully routes byte data through PIL onto simulated directory
Throws custom ImageGenerationError on invalid/missing byte parsing
integration: Generated Image object commits to the filesystem structure with valid .png MIME format

tasks.description: Write an automation test file triggering generation on the actual Google backend.

steps.description: Create demo_module2.py in project root
Instantiate the module 2 adapter and invoke the generation interface with dummy outputs from Module 1

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Script runs end to end and downloads actual imagery successfully based on dummy prompts.

e2e-manual: Execute script against valid key -> verify 1024x1024 generated png is stored on disk properly
Inspect generated PNG manually to ensure dimensions and file data integrity

tasks.task: Define Pixelization Module Structure and Schemas
tasks.description: Create directories, interfaces, and Pydantic models for the Pixelization module.

steps.description: Create src/modules/pixelization and tests/modules/pixelization directories with __init__.py
Define PixelizationInput and PixelizationOutput Pydantic schemas in schemas.py
Define BasePixelization interface class in interface.py
Create exceptions.py for custom ComfyUI errors like connection and timeout errors

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Project structure exists for module 3. Schemas validate input image paths. Interface enforces the generate() method.

unit: PixelizationInput accepts valid local file paths and image byte streams
BasePixelization abstraction prevents direct instantiation

tasks.description: Extend ConfigManager to support ComfyUI URL and workflow template path configurations.

steps.description: Add COMFYUI_URL and COMFYUI_WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE to .env.example
Update ConfigManager to parse these values, prioritizing runtime args over environment variables

tasks.acceptance-criteria: ConfigManager returns valid ComfyUI endpoint URLs and template file paths.

unit: get_comfyui_url defaults to http://127.0.0.1:8188 if none provided
Runtime arguments override environment variables for comfyui_url

tasks.description: Develop a lower-level HTTP and WebSocket client to communicate with the ComfyUI API.

steps.description: Create comfyui_client.py to handle HTTP POST /prompt and POST /upload/image
Implement HTTP GET /history and GET /view to retrieve results
Implement WebSocket listener to block and track generation progress by prompt_id
Add configurable timeout logic to prevent infinite hangs

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Client can successfully upload images, queue workflows, track execution via WebSocket, and download resulting images with explicit timeout limits.

unit: Client HTTP methods successfully parse 200 OK responses with mock data
WebSocket listener correctly identifies completion message for specific prompt_id
Client throws specific ComfyUITimeoutException when generation exceeds timeout
integration: Client gracefully handles ConnectionRefusedError when local ComfyUI is offline

tasks.description: Build the ComfyUIAdapter class to translate inputs into a JSON workflow and orchestrate the API Client.

steps.description: Create comfyui_adapter.py implementing BasePixelization interface
Implement logic to load workflow_api.json template from disk
Inject dynamic variables (uploaded image filename, specific prompts, seed) into fixed Node IDs
Wrap generation execution with logging and map exceptions correctly

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Adapter successfully coordinates the payload generation, uses the client to execute the task, and returns a verified PixelizationOutput.

unit: Adapter generates correct workflow JSON with dynamic node values updated
generate method catches internal client errors and raises adapter-specific exceptions
integration: Adapter executes full lifecycle (upload -> prompt -> wait -> download) using a mocked client instance

tasks.description: Create a demonstrator script that processes a local image through the full ComfyUI pipeline.

steps.description: Create workflow_api_template.json with a valid ComfyUI Graph containing ControlNet and Checkpoint
Create demo_module3.py to load an image and invoke ComfyUIAdapter

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Script runs end-to-end against a running local ComfyUI instance and outputs a pixelated image to disk.

e2e-manual: Execute script while ComfyUI is running locally -> verify converted pixel art image is generated in output folder
Execute script while ComfyUI is stopped -> verify graceful connection error message is printed
